Discover Dialog

Boost conversions x3 with conversion-first features

Lead customers through the full journey by predicting needs, comparing options, and recommending the best products.

AI product recommender

Product quizzes are outdated. AI Product Recommender drives conversion by guiding shoppers from the home page to the right product, through personalized questions or a photo.

Smart reengagement

During the conversation, your Dialog assistant captures what each shopper wants, what’s holding them back, their level of intent, and their contact details. With our integrations with marketing platforms like Klaviyo you can trigger AI-driven email and SMS follow-ups that drive conversion.

AI-to-AI Commerce (ChatGPT, Gemini, Perplexity, etc.)

When shoppers ask questions in ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Gemini, those agents need a trusted source for products, recommendations, and brand rules.

Dialog is that source.
It talks to other agents by encoding how your brand actually sells: recommendation logic, tone, sequencing, and in-store expertise.

Book a demo

Quick setup, secure answers and good tone of voice

Stay in control with robust guardrails and data protection, ensuring your AI always works safely and effectively for your business.

Set up in minutes

Connect your store and data sources easily. Dialog is ready to assist with no heavy integration or complex setup.

Secure with guardrails

Control exactly what Dialog can say and do. Block sensitive topics, restrict sources, and stay in full control.

Deliver on-brand answers

Dialog uses your data to provide precise, consistent information that reflects your brand’s voice and expertise.
